subject: Phase 0A: Implement BrahmaScale.sc and 02_microtonality.scd
description: Create BrahmaScale class with ratio arrays, factory methods for 12-TET, Just Intonation, Pythagorean, Bohlen-Pierce, etc. Scala .scl parser. degreeToFreq, quantize. Create 02_microtonality.scd with global tuning registry and OSC endpoints.
